title: getEntities()
text: getEntities() Returns an array of uniface.Entity objects contained by the current object, or by the main instance. Object . getEntities() Arguments None Return Value Returns an array of uniface.Entity objects. The array is sorted alphabetically by entity name. If the current object is a uniface.Instance object, the array represents the entities that are present on the outermost level of the component instance. If the current object is a uniface.Occurrence object, the array represents the entities that are direct children of the occurrence object. Exceptions The following exceptions may be thrown: uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Description The getEntities function is available on the uniface.Instance object and the uniface.Occurrence object. In both cases, it returns only the entity objects that represent direct children of the component instance or occurrence. Each uniface.Entity object in the array gives access to selected entity properties via the functions it provides. Related Links uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Exception thrown if the object on which the function is called is no longer valid. uniface The uniface object enables you to obtain information about DSP instances. uniface.Instance The uniface.Instance object provides access to selected properties and methods of the component instance that it represents. uniface.Occurrence The uniface.Occurrence object provides access to selected properties of the occurrence that it represents. It is returned by the getOccurrence function of the uniface.Entity object. uniface.Entity The uniface.Entity object provides access to selected properties of the component entity that it represents. It is returned by the getEntities and getEntity functions of the uniface.Instance and uniface.Occurrence objects. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
